Line Control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xc
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Controls UART frame format and baud rate access. Write only when not busy (USR[0]=0).

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7] dlab rw 0x0 DLAB
[6] bc rw 0x0 BC
[5] reserved2 rw 0x0 -
[4] eps rw 0x0 EPS
[3] pen rw 0x0 PEN
[2] stop rw 0x0 STOP
[1:0] dls rw 0x0 DLS

Field Descriptions

dlab - DLAB

Divisor Latch Access Bit. Set to 1 to access DLL/DLH baud rate divisors.

bc - BC

Break Control. Forces serial output (sout) low to generate a break condition.

eps - EPS

Even Parity Select. 0=odd parity, 1=even parity (when PEN=1).

pen - PEN

Parity Enable. 0=parity disabled, 1=parity enabled.

stop - STOP

Stop Bits. 0=1 stop bit, 1=1.5 stop bits (DLS=00) or 2 stop bits (DLS!=00).

dls - DLS

Data Length Select. 00=5 bits, 01=6 bits, 10=7 bits, 11=8 bits.
